tools.name: tienda_nube_get_store
tools.description: Get info about the Tienda Nube store (datos de la tienda) this adapter is bound to (denominación, currency, country, language, contact email).

tools.name: tienda_nube_list_products
tools.description: List Tienda Nube products (listar productos de la tienda) with optional substring search + paginated results. Use `publishedOnly: true` to skip drafts. Returns `hasMore: true` when at least one more p

tools.name: tienda_nube_get_product
tools.description: Get a Tienda Nube product by id (consultar un producto), including all variants.

tools.name: tienda_nube_list_orders
tools.description: List Tienda Nube orders (listar ventas, órdenes de la tienda) with status / payment_status / email filters + ISO 8601 date ranges. Reverse-chronological. The `paymentStatus: "paid"` filter is the typi

tools.name: tienda_nube_get_order
tools.description: Get a Tienda Nube order by id (consultar una orden). Includes contact email + name + addresses + per-line products.

tools.name: tienda_nube_list_customers
tools.description: List Tienda Nube customers (listar clientes) with optional substring search across name + email.

tools.name: tienda_nube_get_customer
tools.description: Get a Tienda Nube customer by id (consultar un cliente), including default_address + total_spent.

tools.name: tienda_nube_list_webhooks
tools.description: List webhook subscriptions registered by this app for this store.

tools.name: tienda_nube_create_webhook
tools.description: Register a webhook subscription. URL must be https://. Common events: order/created, order/paid, order/fulfilled, product/updated, customer/created, app/uninstalled.

tools.name: tienda_nube_delete_webhook
tools.description: Delete a webhook subscription by id. Idempotent: deleting an unknown id resolves without raising.
